positive: A whimsical, highly detailed silhouette illustration of a fox sitting gracefully atop a stack of stylized, ancient books. The background features minimalist, stylized celestial elements like crescent moons, constellations, and orbiting planets, rendered in negative space. The fox should have a majestic, confident posture. Style: Highly intricate line art, inspired by Art Deco geometry and Japanese woodblock prints. Composition: Symmetrical, centered composition, with strong vertical lines. Color Direction: Duotone effect using deep indigo, burnt gold, and creamy off-white. Lighting: High contrast, emphasizing the sharp edges and clean outlines. Print-friendly details: Isolated on a solid background field for easy apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, artifact, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor detail, low resolution, smudge, gradient, realistic photo, grayscale
